commands.review_summary:
The PR adds same-provider auto auth-profile retry to embedded, CLI, and native compaction, preserves user-selected profiles, stops retry on transcript leaf drift, and adds focused tests.

PR surface: Source +198, Tests +139. Total +337 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main resolves one auth profile for direct compaction while normal embedded runs can advance profiles on retryable failures. I did not run a live provider reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should wait for contributor-supplied real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the auth/session retry semantics; no narrow automated code repair remains from this pass.

target.title: fix(agents): retry compaction with backup auth profiles
target.body:
## Summary
- retry native compaction with the next same-provider auth profile when an auto-selected profile hits retryable rate-limit/overload failures
- keep user-selected auth profiles locked so manual profile choices are not silently replaced
- stop profile failover if the transcript leaf changes between attempts, avoiding retrying compaction after state drift
- thread the auto/user auth-profile source through CLI/native compaction so delegated compaction uses the same retry gate

Fixes #53531

## What Problem This Solves
Compaction currently keeps using a single auto-selected auth profile when that profile hits retryable provider/auth failures, even when another same-provider profile is available. This can leave auto compaction stuck on a rate-limited or overloaded profile while normal embedded runs can rotate to a backup profile.

## Evidence
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts` (72 tests passed)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/command/cli-compaction.test.ts` (19 tests passed)
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo`
- `node scripts/check-session-accessor-boundary.mjs`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.types.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compaction-runtime-context.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.queued.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.harness.ts src/agents/command/cli-compaction.ts src/agents/command/cli-compaction.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

## Notes
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core.tsbuildinfo` currently fails on latest `main` in `src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/tool-result-context-guard.ts` because `CONTEXT_LIMIT_TRUNCATION_NOTICE` is unused. This file is outside this PR's diff.
